case_for: Rodgers has cleared 12.0 points in five of his last six games and is trending upward, with a projection of 20.3 points that comfortably clears the threshold.
case_against: As a pocket-limited, turnover-prone passer this season with a modest floor around 11-12 points, any off game or short-yardage/turnover-heavy script could drop him just under the threshold.
